directions_tried.name: Phase 1: Off-diagonal form factor + Li criterion (parallel)
directions_tried.outcome: E001 PARTIAL: 1.6% gap closure, perturbative invalid. E002 SUCCESS: all λ_n>0, phase cancellation, λ_n^zeta<λ_n^GUE at K=N=2000.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2: Non-perturbative approach + Claim A verification
directions_tried.outcome: E003: Δ₃=0.1545 confirmed. E004: N²/p universality rejected.

directions_tried.name: Phase 3: Prime orbit K(τ) + adversarial review + λ_n validation + convergence
directions_tried.outcome: E005: Rigidity hierarchy. E006: Berry formula confirmed. E007: λ_n ratio NOVEL (4/5) then E009 REFUTED it as truncation artifact. No novel claims survived.

explorations_completed.key_finding: Berry-Keating perturbative corrections require T>>10^10. R2_c gives only 1.6% gap closure.
All 500 λ_n>0. Phase cancellation. λ_n^zeta<λ_n^GUE at K=N=2000 for n>272.
Δ₃_sat=0.1545 confirmed. 47% more rigid than GUE analytic. Flat saturation plateau.
N²/p universality REJECTED. β_max decreasing with N. Gauss sum finite-size artifact.
Berry formula: 0.154 at T=600 (0.6% error). K→Σ₂ route has 2x normalization issue.
λ_n^zeta/λ_n^GUE crossover NOVEL (4/5): no prior literature compares these. Berry accuracy = artifact.
Novel claim WEAKENED: ratio 0.949 at K=N=2000 (7.3σ), truncation-sensitive.
TRUNCATION ARTIFACT CONFIRMED. Ratio 0.888→1.090 as K=N=500→5000. Crosses 1 at K~2500. Novel claim REFUTED.
